findingCodes.description: The tagging manifest JSON does not validate against tagging.schema.json.
findingCodes.remediation: Re-run tag-builder to produce a valid tagging.json, then re-run pdf-writer. Check that the tagging contract has not drifted from the schema.

findingCodes.description: The tagging tree root element is not of type 'Document'. PDF/UA requires a Document root.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure tag-builder emits a root node with type 'Document'. Inspect tagging.json to verify root.type === 'Document'.

findingCodes.description: The writer manifest does not claim native tagging was applied. The PDF may only have a sidecar manifest without embedded structure.
findingCodes.remediation: Run pdf-writer with the PDFBox backend to inject native structure tree and marked-content operators into the output PDF.

findingCodes.description: PDF metadata stream (XMP) and document information dictionary are inconsistent.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure pdf-writer synchronizes XMP metadata with the Info dictionary. This finding may be auto-suppressed if the validator's metadata probe confirms consistency (known veraPDF false positive with PDFBox output).

findingCodes.description: PDF/UA identification not properly set in XMP metadata.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure pdf-writer sets pdfuaid:part in the XMP metadata. This finding may be auto-suppressed if the validator's metadata probe confirms the identification is present.

findingCodes.description: General PDF/UA structure requirement violation (clause 7.1).
findingCodes.remediation: Inspect the veraPDF report details for the specific check context. Common causes: missing StructTreeRoot, incorrect role mapping, or missing /MarkInfo.

findingCodes.description: Content not properly tagged or artifacts not marked. All real content must be in the structure tree; all decorative content must be marked as Artifact.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure all text blocks are tagged by tag-builder and pdf-writer marks decorative elements as Artifact in the structure tree.

findingCodes.description: Figure element missing alternative text (/Alt).
findingCodes.remediation: Add alt text to figure nodes in semantic-engine or tag-builder. Every <Figure> in the structure tree must have an /Alt entry.

findingCodes.description: Table structure violation. Tables must use TH/TD within TR within Table.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure layout-analyzer correctly identifies table cells and tag-builder produces proper Table > TR > TH/TD hierarchy.

findingCodes.description: Missing or incorrect natural language specification. All content must declare its language.
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure pdf-writer sets /Lang on the document catalog and on structure elements when the language changes. Use semantic-engine languageHint or auto-detection.

findingCodes.description: Font not properly embedded or CIDSet descriptor present for subsetted CID font.
findingCodes.remediation: Enable stripCidSet in the pdfWriter profile config. Ensure all fonts are fully embedded. Check OVERLAY_FONT_PATH for a valid embeddable font.

findingCodes.description: Cross-reference table is damaged or missing
findingCodes.remediation: Automatically rebuilt from discovered objects

findingCodes.description: Declared stream length doesn't match actual data
findingCodes.remediation: Length entry corrected to match actual stream

findingCodes.description: FlateFilter compressed stream contains invalid data
findingCodes.remediation: Partial recovery attempted; truncated at corruption point

findingCodes.description: Font program is unreadable or missing required tables
findingCodes.remediation: Noted for font-embedder substitution

findingCodes.description: Font lacks ToUnicode CMap for text extraction
findingCodes.remediation: Repairable by font-embedder stage

findingCodes.description: Object reference points to non-existent object
findingCodes.remediation: Reference nullified

findingCodes.description: PDF header or trailer is missing or malformed
findingCodes.remediation: Header/trailer reconstructed

findingCodes.description: PDF file appears truncated (missing %%EOF or incomplete objects)
findingCodes.remediation: Salvageable content extracted

findingCodes.description: Multiple incremental saves left orphaned data
findingCodes.remediation: Consolidated to single clean revision

findingCodes.description: Font is referenced but its program is not embedded in the PDF
findingCodes.remediation: Embed the full font program or substitute with an embeddable equivalent

findingCodes.description: Embedded font program contains invalid or unreadable data
findingCodes.remediation: Re-embed the font from the original source or substitute with a known-good copy

findingCodes.description: Embedded font program is truncated and missing required tables
findingCodes.remediation: Re-embed the complete font program; verify stream length matches actual data

findingCodes.description: PDF relies on a Standard 14 font without embedding, which may render differently across viewers
findingCodes.remediation: Embed the font explicitly to guarantee consistent rendering

findingCodes.description: Font dictionary lacks a required FontDescriptor entry
findingCodes.remediation: Add a FontDescriptor with at least FontName, Flags, FontBBox, ItalicAngle, Ascent, Descent, and CapHeight

findingCodes.description: Font lacks a ToUnicode CMap, preventing reliable text extraction and search
findingCodes.remediation: Generate and attach a ToUnicode CMap that maps glyph codes to Unicode values

findingCodes.description: ToUnicode CMap is present but contains invalid mappings or syntax errors
findingCodes.remediation: Regenerate the ToUnicode CMap from the font's cmap table or glyph names

findingCodes.description: Font uses Identity-H encoding without a ToUnicode CMap, making text extraction impossible
findingCodes.remediation: Attach a ToUnicode CMap; Identity-H encoded fonts require explicit Unicode mappings

findingCodes.description: Symbolic font has no Differences array in its Encoding, making glyph mapping ambiguous
findingCodes.remediation: Add an Encoding dictionary with a Differences array mapping character codes to glyph names

findingCodes.description: Font encoding declared in the PDF conflicts with the encoding in the embedded font program
findingCodes.remediation: Reconcile the PDF Encoding dictionary with the embedded font's cmap and post tables

findingCodes.description: Font maps glyphs to Unicode Private Use Area codepoints without a ToUnicode CMap for proper semantics
findingCodes.remediation: Add a ToUnicode CMap that maps PUA codepoints to their actual Unicode equivalents

findingCodes.description: Glyph widths declared in the PDF font dictionary do not match the embedded font program metrics
findingCodes.remediation: Regenerate the Widths array from the embedded font program's hmtx table

findingCodes.description: Font is missing glyphs required for the document content, causing .notdef rendering
findingCodes.remediation: Embed a font that contains all required glyphs or substitute with a superset font

findingCodes.description: FontBBox in the FontDescriptor is zero, negative, or otherwise invalid
findingCodes.remediation: Recalculate FontBBox from the embedded font program's head table

findingCodes.description: Font metrics (Ascent, Descent, CapHeight) are missing or inconsistent with the font program
findingCodes.remediation: Recalculate metrics from the embedded font program's OS/2 and hhea tables

findingCodes.description: CIDFont is missing required CIDSystemInfo dictionary (Registry, Ordering, Supplement)
findingCodes.remediation: Add CIDSystemInfo with appropriate Registry/Ordering/Supplement values for the font's character collection

findingCodes.description: Type 0 composite font has missing or invalid DescendantFonts array
findingCodes.remediation: Ensure DescendantFonts contains exactly one CIDFont dictionary

findingCodes.description: CIDToGIDMap stream is corrupt or maps CIDs to invalid glyph indices
findingCodes.remediation: Regenerate CIDToGIDMap from the embedded font program's cmap table

findingCodes.description: Font subset tag prefix does not follow the six-uppercase-letter+plus convention or is inconsistent
findingCodes.remediation: Regenerate the subset prefix to match the AAAAAA+ convention required by PDF/A and PDF/UA

findingCodes.description: CIDSet stream does not account for all CIDs used in the document content
findingCodes.remediation: Regenerate CIDSet to include all referenced CIDs, or remove CIDSet for PDF 2.0 compliance

findingCodes.description: Default appearance string references a font not present in the default resources (DR) dictionary
findingCodes.remediation: Add the referenced font to the AcroForm DR dictionary or correct the DA string

findingCodes.description: Content stream references a font name not declared in the page or form Resources dictionary
findingCodes.remediation: Add the font to the appropriate Resources/Font dictionary

findingCodes.description: Type 3 user-defined font detected; these fonts have limited accessibility and portability
findingCodes.remediation: Consider replacing Type 3 fonts with Type 1 or TrueType equivalents for better compatibility

findingCodes.description: Font's OS/2 code page or Unicode range does not cover the language declared in the document
findingCodes.remediation: Substitute with a font that supports the declared document language's character repertoire
